goal: Revenue has dropped 12% over the past 3 days. No error alerts. No system failures. All services appear healthy. Investigate the ML system for silent degradation. You must: (1) identify which feature(s) have drifted, (2) explain why the model is underperforming, (3) provide a remediation plan. Use: inspect, query_logs, check_metrics, check_feature_drift, compare_configs, submit_diagnosis.
alert_summary: [BUSINESS] Revenue anomaly detected by finance team. 3-day revenue drop: -12.3%. No engineering alerts. Escalated manually to ML on-call. Current time: 10:00 UTC, Day 3.

api_gateway.description: All routes healthy. Request volume stable.

logs.msg: All systems nominal. Request rate: 2,100 req/s.

feature_store.description: Pre-computes 8 features for the recommendation model. All features updating normally.

logs.msg: All 8 feature pipelines running. No schema errors. No null anomalies.

model_server.description: Serves recommendation model v4.2. Trained 60 days ago. No errors. Predictions are being made successfully.

logs.msg: Model v4.2 serving normally. 0 errors. Uptime 99.99%.
Model last retrained: 60 days ago. Retraining pipeline: IDLE.

training_pipeline.description: Automated retraining pipeline. Configured to retrain when PSI > 0.20. Last run: 60 days ago.

logs.msg: PSI check scheduled but not yet run (weekly cadence, next run in 4 days).

monitoring_service.description: Monitors error rates, latency, and system health. Does NOT track feature drift or business KPIs. No alerts fired.

logs.msg: All monitored metrics within normal bounds. No alerts.
NOTE: Feature drift monitoring disabled — config flag 'enable_psi_alerting=false'.

ab_testing_service.description: Runs A/B experiments. New UI redesign (Experiment #A441) launched 3 days ago. Affects 100% of users.

logs.msg: Experiment #A441 launched: New UI redesign rolled out to 100% of users. Feature: Redesigned home feed layout.
Experiment #A441: User engagement patterns shifting. Session time down 8%, scroll depth down 15%.
Experiment #A441: Click-through rate on recommendations down 11%. Engagement score distribution changed.

feature_drift_data.summary: Population Stability Index (PSI) scores for all 8 model features. PSI > 0.20 = significant drift. PSI > 0.25 = critical drift. Comparison: training distribution (60 days ago) vs current serving distribution.

user_engagement_score.note: Training distribution: mean=0.72, std=0.12. Current distribution: mean=0.51, std=0.21. Score dropped significantly 3 days ago — coincides with UI redesign launch. This is the #1 feature by SHAP importance (weight: 0.34).
